title: rubus obtortus
intro: Rubus obtortus, also known as the twisted bramble or wild raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rubus obtortus include reducing inflammation and relieving digestive issues due to its high content of anthocyanins and other bioactive compounds. Rubus obtortus can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, and is often used in traditional herbal medicine to promote overall well-being.
